name: lingui-extract-bench
description: Reproducible benchmark harness for the Lingui experimental (esbuild) message extractor: synthetic app generator, phase profiler, worker-scaling and version A/B benchmarks, and Babel-vs-Rust(SWC) extractor throughput.

scripts.gen: node apps/synthetic/generate.mjs --out runners/v5 --preset heavy && node apps/synthetic/generate.mjs --out runners/v6 --preset heavy
scripts.profile:v5: node apps/synthetic/generate.mjs --out runners/v5 --preset heavy && cd runners/v5 && node ../../tools/profile-v5.mjs
scripts.profile:v6: node apps/synthetic/generate.mjs --out runners/v6 --preset heavy && cd runners/v6 && node ../../tools/profile.mjs
scripts.bench:workers: node apps/synthetic/generate.mjs --out runners/v6 --preset heavy && bash scripts/bench-workers.sh runners/v6
scripts.bench:extractor: node apps/synthetic/generate.mjs --out runners/v6 --preset heavy && cd runners/v6 && node ../../tools/bench-extractor.mjs
scripts.bench:all: pnpm run bench:3way && pnpm run bench:ab-w1 && pnpm run profile:v5 && pnpm run profile:v6 && pnpm run bench:extractor
